label: NgRx SignalStore
description: Signal-first feature stores via @ngrx/signals for state shared across many components with non-trivial logic.
claudeMdSummaryLine: State: NgRx SignalStore (@ngrx/signals) — see .claude/rules/state.md for a known Angular-version compatibility note
knownIssues: @ngrx/signals@21.1.1's peerDependencies require @angular/core ^21.0.0 exactly — verified against the live npm registry. This is now hard-enforced via minAngularMajor/maxAngularMajor (generate.js refuses the combination outside Angular 21), not just a warning — this note explains why the constraint exists. Re-verify @ngrx/signals's current peer range before assuming this window is still exactly v21-only; if it has widened, update minAngularMajor/maxAngularMajor to match rather than leaving this artificially narrow.
